comment.body: So let’s break it down… if Alma posts trade signals, that’s a problem; if she doesn’t, that’s a problem. If she writes anything, it’s either too technical, too mathematical, or too macro. And that 35 bucks? Turns out it is damn pricey, lol. You’re ticked she won’t answer the same questions for the 88th time. Bottom line: nothing she does is ever ‘good enough.’ Literally Honestly, whatever she does, it’s guaranteed to be wrong.. and you’re shocked she’s stepping back from the chat? C’mon guyz, let’s be real…
